90002.notes: Fixture exercises the vision preprocessor. Success is measured via expected_pipeline_signals — not the final verdict — because visual layout bugs are hard to auto-verify. expected_status/confidence are null to explicitly signal that the harness must NOT assert on the Validator verdict for this fixture. Success = vision preprocessor produced a non-empty attachments.md AND the Analyst used it to classify area=Streams AND didn't SKIP for 'no repro steps'.
